# ebhelper_asg_termination_policy

Configures the termination policies on an EB-managed Auto Scaling Group, controlling which instances are terminated first during scale-in. On destroy, resets to `["Default"]`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ebhelper_asg_termination_policy" "app" {
  asg_name             = ebhelper_environment_info.app.asg_name
  termination_policies = ["OldestInstance"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asg_name` (String) Name of the Auto Scaling Group. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `termination_policies` (List of String) Ordered list of termination policies. Valid values: `Default`, `OldestInstance`, `NewestInstance`, `OldestLaunchConfiguration`, `OldestLaunchTemplate`, `ClosestToNextInstanceHour`, `AllocationStrategy`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (ASG name).
